name: Rogue Ninjas
short_description: In Rogue Ninjas, survival demands cunning and precision. Manage a squad of elite ninjas through twisting dungeons, strengthen your inventory with rare enhancers, and battle ruthless bosses in this dice-driven roguelike adventure.
detailed_description:
Rogue Ninjas is a turn-based dice-building roguelike where you command a squad of deadly ninjas through intense dungeon crawls, tactical battles, and boss fights.
Master the art of strategy by managing your squad’s inventory, upgrading with powerful enhancers, and using dice rolls to shift the odds in your favor. Every move matters as you face relentless enemies and forge your path to victory.

Dice-Driven Combat: Roll dice at the start of each turn and use the results to activate cards from your inventory. Match odd, even, or specific dice values to unleash powerful abilities and overcome enemies with smart dice management!

Squad Management: Control a squad of unique ninjas, each with distinct abilities and roles. Strategically swap their positions on the battlefield to maximize their strengths, protect vulnerable allies, and adapt to the flow of combat. Master positioning to turn the tide of battle!

Inventory Loadout System: Strategically assign powerful cards from your inventory to each ninja. With limited slots and unique card effects, careful planning is crucial to maximize your squad’s potential in battle.

Whether you're crawling through twisted dungeons, battling overwhelming bosses, or managing your inventory to survive another run, Rogue Ninjas offers a fresh and replayable adventure in every playthrough.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese
